rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Demurrer Of Willie A. Davis To First Amended Petition Of Petitioners To Revoke Probate Of Will And To Each Other Cause Of Action Therein Alleged
rulings.Rulings: 1st cause of action by Lee McGlothin to Cancel Deed: Tentative ruling: Overruled. 10 days leave to Answer. 2nd cause of action by Florence McGlothin to Revoke Probate: Tentative ruling: Sustained without leave to amend. 3rd cause of action by Lee McGlothin to quiet title: Tentative ruling: Overruled. 10 days leave to Answer. 4th cause of action by Florence McGlothin for Elder Abuse: Tentative ruling: Overruled. 10 days leave to Answer.
